channel.title: Kde-Plasma on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Kde-Plasma on Arrans github.io

item.title: mak448a/Qtcord
item.description: Qtcord is a Discord client built with Qt aiming to bring a lightweight, native experience.

item.title: comxd/plasma-kdeconnect-sms
item.description: 📱 💬 Plasmoid for KDE Connect allowing SMS sending from your desktop — KDE Plasma 6
